deep_dive.title: From RGB Generation to Dense Field Readout: Pixel-Space Dense Prediction with Text-to-Image Models
deep_dive.abstract: Large-scale text-to-image models are attractive backbones for dense prediction because RGB generation pretraining learns rich semantic, structural, and geometric priors. Existing generative and editing approaches reuse these priors by casting dense prediction as target generation: annotations such as depth, normals, alpha mattes, masks, and heatmaps are encoded into an RGB-trained VAE latent space and decoded back as image-like targets. We argue this inherits more of the generative output interface than dense prediction requires: unlike RGB synthesis, dense prediction asks for pixel-correct, task-native fields on the same image plane, not new RGB content to be rendered. Our key observation is that a pretrained DiT already organizes RGB inputs through a patch-to-token-to-patch lattice on the image plane, so each token indexes a fixed output patch whose channels can carry task-native quantities instead of RGB appearance. We instantiate this as ReChannel: we keep the VAE encoder for the DiT's input distribution but drop the target-side decoder, adapt the frozen DiT with task LoRA, and map each token to its p x p x K_t pixel-space patch through a shared token-local linear head--about 33K parameters, no spatial mixing. Using FLUX-Klein, we evaluate on six dense prediction tasks and over a dozen benchmarks. This minimal interface sets new state-of-the-art on trimap-free matting, KITTI depth, and referring segmentation, and stays competitive on normals, saliency, and pose. In a matched 4B setting it is more accurate and 2.48x faster than an edit-plus-latent-decode counterpart--dense perception can benefit from generative pretraining without inheriting its output interface.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: directly addresses alpha matte prediction as dense field readout, relevant to alpha channel generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 直接处理alpha抠图预测作为密集场读出，与alpha通道生成相关
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 直接处理alpha抠图预测作为密集场读出，与alpha通道生成相关
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 直接处理alpha抠图预测作为密集场读出，与alpha通道生成相关
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Argues dense prediction (depth, normals, alpha mattes) should use task-native readout instead of RGB-style generation. Proposes a method to read out dense fields from pretrained DiT. Directly relevant to alpha generation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文指出现有方法将密集预测（如深度、法线、alpha抠图）编码为RGB图像生成是不必要的，提出直接从预训练DiT中读出像素级任务原生场。该方法涉及alpha通道的生成与预测，为透明视频生成提供了技术基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文指出现有方法将密集预测（如深度、法线、alpha抠图）编码为RGB图像生成是不必要的，提出直接从预训练DiT中读出像素级任务原生场。该方法涉及alpha通道的生成与预测，为透明视频生成提供了技术基础。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: techniques for generating transparent or alpha channel videos
